title: The Great Extinction
desc: Titans emerge as Earth's immune system. King Ghidorah's species visits Earth, devastating ecosystems. Godzilla's ancestors fight back.

title: End of the Dinosaurs
desc: Mass extinction event. Godzilla's ancestor species survives by retreating to radiation-rich ocean depths. Kong's ancestors flourish on Hollow Earth.

title: Ancient War / Hollow Earth Kingdom
desc: Titanus Kong species rules Hollow Earth. Ancient civilization ('Iwi') lives in harmony with Kong's ancestors on Skull Island. Skar King banished to deep Subterranea.

title: Godzilla vs. Massive Unidentified Terrestrial Organism (U.S. Navy)
desc: US submarine crew encounters Godzilla in the Pacific. First modern documented sighting. Information classified by U.S. Department of Defense.

title: First Contact — Bikini Atoll Testing
desc: Nuclear testing in the Pacific wakes Godzilla. The connection between nuclear radiation and Titan activation is first theorized.

title: Monarch Founded
desc: Colonel Lee Shaw, Dr. Keiko Miura, and Bill Randa establish a covert scientific organization to study Massive Unidentified Terrestrial Organisms (MUTOs).

title: Godzilla Attacks Tokyo
desc: Godzilla first attacks Tokyo. Massive casualties. Dr. Serizawa deploys the Oxygen Destroyer to kill Godzilla. The weapon's radiation lingers in Tokyo Bay — eventually spawning Destoroyah in 1995.

title: Skull Island Expedition
desc: Monarch and Landsat team reach Skull Island. Kong first encountered by modern humans. Seismic weapons lure Skull Crawlers. Monarch establishes perimeter.

title: MUTO Prime Awakens
desc: Monarch discovers MUTO egg sac in the Philippines. Janjira nuclear plant incident planned by MUTO. Joe Brody's wife killed. Site quarantined.

title: Biollante Incident
desc: Dr. Genichiro Shiragami splices Godzilla's cells with his deceased daughter's DNA and a rose. Biollante emerges. The G-Project's unintended consequences.

title: Godzilla's Death (Heisei)
desc: Godzilla's heart melts down. Destoroyah — born from the original Oxygen Destroyer — delivers the killing blow. Godzilla Junior absorbs the radiation and inherits the mantle.

title: MUTO Awakening / Godzilla Returns
desc: MUTOs emerge. Godzilla surfaces to hunt them. San Francisco battle. Godzilla wins and returns to the ocean. Monarch's existence becomes public knowledge.

title: Kong: Skull Island Expedition
desc: Geological survey of Skull Island reveals Hollow Earth access point. Kong confirmed as Alpha. Skull Crawlers partially contained.

title: Titan Awakening / Alpha War
desc: Eco-terrorists release all Titans. King Ghidorah seizes Alpha status. Godzilla defeats Ghidorah in Boston. Mothra sacrifices herself. Godzilla declared Alpha.

title: Battle for Alpha / Hollow Earth Discovery
desc: Godzilla attacks Apex Cybernetics. Kong travels to Hollow Earth. Mechagodzilla activated and goes rogue. Kong acquires axe. Godzilla and Kong defeat Mechagodzilla together.

title: Monarch: Legacy Investigation
desc: Randa family uncovers the original Monarch mission. Lee Shaw resurfaces. Hollow Earth portals destabilize. Godzilla emerges globally.

title: Skar King Uprising / Shimo Awakens
desc: Skar King leads enslaved Titans from deep Hollow Earth. Shimo — the frozen Titan — weaponized against surface world. Godzilla and Kong team up to defeat the Skar King.

title: Shin Godzilla Emergence
desc: An unknown creature evolves in Tokyo Bay. Rapid, uncontrolled evolution in front of the cameras. Japan paralysed by bureaucratic inaction. Frozen by the Yaguchi formula.

title: Godzilla Minus One
desc: Post-WWII Japan, 1945–47. Godzilla attacks Ginza. Survivors form a civilian operation. Koichi Shikishima faces both survivor's guilt and the apex predator.

title: Humanity Abandons Earth
desc: Anime trilogy. Godzilla has dominated Earth for 20 years. Humanity flees on a colony ship. Earth becomes a Godzilla biome.

title: Godzilla Earth
desc: Humanity returns to find a 300m evolved Godzilla Earth that has fused with the planet's electromagnetic field. The final confrontation between humanity and its replacement.
